entities.name: Fitbit
entities.context: Wearable health tracking platform whose API is integrated into V's workout tracker

entities.name: WorkoutTracker
entities.context: V's personal health tracking system located at Personal/Health/WorkoutTracker

entities.name: Fitbit Web API
entities.context: REST API used to pull activities, heart rate, sleep, HRV, SpO2, skin temp, weight, VO2 max, and stress data

entities.name: OAuth2
entities.context: Authentication mechanism used for Fitbit API access via authorize and token endpoints

entities.name: Heart Rate Variability (HRV)
entities.context: Health metric tracked via Fitbit API endpoint /hrv/date

entities.name: SpO2
entities.context: Blood oxygen saturation metric tracked via Fitbit API endpoint /spo2/date

entities.name: VO2 Max
entities.context: Cardio fitness score tracked via Fitbit API endpoint /cardioscore/date

entities.name: Skin Temperature
entities.context: Body temperature metric tracked via Fitbit API endpoint /temp/skin/date

entities.name: Stress Score
entities.context: Stress metric tracked via Fitbit API endpoint /stress/stress-score/date

entities.name: Sleep Tracking
entities.context: Sleep data tracked via Fitbit API v1.2 sleep date range endpoint

entities.name: Intraday Activity
entities.context: Minute-level activity and heart rate data pulled from Fitbit intraday endpoints

entities.name: Weight Tracking
entities.context: Body weight logs tracked via Fitbit API endpoint /body/log/weight/date

relationships.context: WorkoutTracker pulls health data from Fitbit's REST API endpoints
Authentication to Fitbit API uses OAuth2 flow with stored config credentials
Fitbit provides the Web API that exposes user health data
API exposes HRV data via dedicated endpoint
API exposes blood oxygen data via dedicated endpoint
API exposes cardio fitness score via cardioscore endpoint
API exposes skin temperature data via dedicated endpoint
API exposes stress score data via dedicated endpoint
API exposes sleep data via v1.2 date range endpoint
API exposes minute-level activity and heart rate intraday data
API exposes body weight logs via date range endpoint
V maintains a personal WorkoutTracker system in their Health directory
V uses Fitbit as a wearable health data source
